original_image_tags: A stylized globe graphic with horizontal lines and a dot-matrix pattern is present in the bottom left corner. The word "CENTER" appears in large, bold letters to the right of the NOTICE box.

elements.description: NASA logo (meatball) in the top left corner.
Circular globe and arrow graphic in the bottom left corner.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of a globe/arrow graphic in the bottom left corner and do not contradict each other on visual content.
